title: fumaria mairei subsp. saxicola
intro: Fumaria mairei subsp. saxicola, also known as Saxicole Fumitory, is a perennial plant species in the Fumaria genus, characterized by its yellow or greenish-yellow flowers and erect stems. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, primarily to treat various skin conditions, including eczema, acne, and dermatitis, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Fumaria mairei subsp. saxicola include its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its antiseptic and antifungal properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tincture or infusion, and it can also be applied topically as a poultice or cream to treat skin conditions.
